D=Math.floor((E-d)/h),N=Math.floor((C-d)/h);return y.isDark(N,D)?0:1}else return 1})},y.createImgTag=function(h,v,f){h=h||2,v=typeof v>"u"?h*4:v;let d=y.getModuleCount()*h+v*2,m="";return f=0;f<h.length;f+=1){let d=h.charAt(f);switch(d){case"<":v+="&lt;";break;case">":v+="&gt;";break;case"&":v+="&amp;";break;case'"':v+="&quot;";break;default:v+=d;break}}return v},O=function(h){h=typeof "),d<=C&&C<m&&d<=E+1&&E+1<m&&y.isDark(N,Math.floor((C-d)/1))?_+=" ":_+="\u2588",$+=h<1&&E+1>=m?P[_]:L[_];$+=`%0A`}return f%252&&h>0?$.substring(0,$.length-f-1)+Array(f+1).join("\u2580"):$.substring(0,$.length-1)};return y.createASCII=function(h,v){if(h=h||1,h<2)return O(v);h-=1,v=typeof v>"u"?h*2:v;let e={sin:Math.sin,cos:Math.cos,tan:Math.tan,sqrt:Math.sqrt,abs:Math.abs,log:Math.log,ln:Math.log,floor:Math.floor,ceil:Math.ceil,round:Math.round},t=[],r=s.trim(),i=/\s*(?:(\d+(?:\.\d*)?|\.\d+)|([A-Za-z]+)|([()+\-*/%25^]))/gy,o=0,n;for(;o<r.length;){if(i.lastIndex=o,n=i.exec(r),!n)throw new Error(`Unexpected token at ${o+1}`);t.push(n[1]?{type:"number",value:Number(n[1])}:n[2]?{type:"name",value:n[2].toLowerCase()}:{type:n[3],value:n[3]}),o=i.lastIndex}let a=0,c=b=>t[a]?.type===b,p=b=>{if(!c(b))throw new Error(`Expected ${b}`);return t[a++]},y=()=>{if(c("number"))return p("number").value;if(c("(")){p("(");let b=T();return p(")"),b}if(c("name")){let b=p("name").value;if(b==="pi")return Math.PI;if(b==="e")return Math.E;if(!e[b])throw new Error(`Unknown function: ${b}`);p("(");let A=T();return p(")"),e[b](A)}throw new Error("Expected a number")},l=()=>c("+")?(p("+"),l()):c("-")?(p("-"),-l()):y(),u=()=>{let b=l();return c("^")?(p("^"),b**u()):b},k=()=>{let b=u();for(;c("*")||c("/")||c("%25");){let A=t[a++].type,R=u();b=A==="*"?b*R:A==="/"?b/R:b%25R}return b},T=()=>{let b=k();for(;c("+")||c("-");){let A=t[a++].type,R=k();b=A==="+"?b+R:b-R}return b};if(!t.length)throw new Error("Enter an expression");let x=T();if(a!==t.length)throw new Error("Unexpected input");return x}function zt(s){I(s,H("SCIENTIFIC CALCULATOR","Keyboard-ready expressions with local history.",`<div id="convOutput" aria-label="Second conversion value"><select id="convTo" aria-label="Second unit"></select></div></div><div id="currencyRate" style="margin-top:14px;display:none"><div class="row wrap"><label for="usdInrRate">1 USD equals</label><input type="number" id="usdInrRate" min="0.0001" step="0.01" value="${S.data.settings.usdInrRate}" style="max-width:180px"><span>INR</span><button id="refreshCurrencyRate">REFRESH RATE</button></div><div id="currencyRateStatus" class="muted tiny" style="margin-top:8px"></div><div class="muted tiny" style="margin-top:5px">Daily informational reference rate from Frankfurter; transaction rates may differ.</div></div></div></div>`));let e=g("%23convType"),t=g("%23convFrom"),r=g("%23convTo"),i=g("%23convInput"),o=g("%23convOutput"),n=g("%23usdInrRate"),a=g("%23currencyRate"),c="from",p=()=>{let x=e.value==="temperature"?["C","F","K"]:e.value==="currency"?["USD","INR"]:Object.keys(rt[e.value]);I(t,x.map(b=>`<option>${b}</option>`).join("")),I(r,x.map((b,A)=>`<option ${A===1?"selected":""}>${b}</option>`).join("")),a.style.display=e.value==="currency"?"":"none",i.value="1",c="from",k("from")},y=(x,b,A)=>{let R=b==="C"?x:b==="F"?(x-32)*5/9:x-273.15;return A==="C"?R:A==="F"?R*9/5+32:R+273.15},l=(x,b,A)=>{let R=Number(n.value);return e.value==="temperature"?y(x,b,A):e.value==="currency"?!Number.isFinite(R)||R<=0?NaN:b===A?x:b==="USD"?x*R:x/R:x*rt[e.value][b]/rt[e.value][A]},u=x=>Number(x.toFixed(8)).toString();function k(x=c){c=x;let b=x==="from"?i:o,A=x==="from"?o:i,R=x==="from"?t.value:r.value,U=x==="from"?r.value:t.value;if(b.value.trim()===""){A.value="";return}let G=l(Number(b.value),R,U);A.value=Number.isFinite(G)?u(G):""}n.oninput=()=>{let x=Number(n.value);Number.isFinite(x)&&x>0&&(S.data.settings.usdInrRate=x,S.data.settings.usdInrManual=!0,S.save(),W="idle"),V(),k(c)},g("%23refreshCurrencyRate").onclick=()=>gt({force:!0});let T=()=>{n.value=S.data.settings.usdInrRate,V(),k(c)};st=T,w.cleanup.push(()=>{st===T&&(st=()=>{})}),e.oninput=p,t.oninput=()=>k(c),r.oninput=()=>k(c),i.oninput=()=>k("from"),o.oninput=()=>k("to"),p(),V()}function ne(s){I(s,H("TEXT LAB","Transform, inspect, encode, and format text.",`<div class="grid"><div class="card full"><textarea id="textInput" placeholder="Paste text here..."></textarea><div class="row TextEncoder().encode(e.value).length};e.oninput=t,j("[data-text]").forEach(r=>r.onclick=async()=>{try{let i=r.dataset.text,o=e.value;i==="upper"&&(e.value=o.toUpperCase()),i==="lower"&&(e.value=o.toLowerCase()),i==="title"&&(e.value=o.toLowerCase().replace(/\b\w/g,n=>n.toUpperCase())),i==="b64e"&&(e.value=btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(o)))),i==="b64d"&&(e.value=decodeURIComponent(escape(atob(o)))),i==="urle"&&(e.value=encodeURIComponent(o)),i==="urld"&&(e.value=decodeURIComponent(o)),i==="json"&&(e.value=JSON.stringify(JSON.parse(o),null,2)),i==="copy"&&(await m=l.has("w")||y==="one"&&l.has("ArrowUp"),E=l.has("s")||y==="one"&&l.has("ArrowDown");r=Math.max(0,Math.min(340,r+(Number(E)-Number(m))*u*d)),y==="two"?i=Math.max(0,Math.min(340,i+(Number(l.has("ArrowDown"))-Number(l.has("ArrowUp")))*u*d)):i+=Math.sign(o.y-(i+40))*Math.min(190*d,Math.abs(o.y-(i+40))),o.x+=o.vx*d,o.y+=o.vy*d,(o.y<o.r||o.y>420-o.r)&&(o.vy*=-1),o.x<35&&o.x>20&&o.y>r&&o.y<r+80&&o.vx<0&&(o.vx=Math.abs(o.vx)*1.04,o.vy+=(o.y-(r+40))*5),o.x>665&&o.x<680&&o.y>i&&o.y<i+80&&o.vx>0&&(o.vx=-Math.abs(o.vx)*1.04,o.vy+=(o.y-(i+40))*5),o.x<0&&(n[1]++,R(1)),o.x>700&&(n[0]++,y==="one"&&it("pong",n[0]),R(-1)),Math.max(...n)>=7&&(a=y==="one"?n[0]===7?"won":"lost":n[0]===7?"left-won":"right-won",b())},M=()=>{if(t.fillStyle="%23020704",t.fillRect(0,0,700,420),t.strokeStyle="%231c6d38",t.setLineDash([8,10]),t.beginPath(),t.moveTo(350,0),t.lineTo(350,420),t.stroke(),t.setLineDash([]),t.fillStyle="%2339ff88",t.fillRect(20,r,12,80),t.fillRect(668,i,12,80),t.fillStyle="%23d7ffe3",t.beginPath(),t.arc(o.x,o.y,o.r,0,Math.PI*2),t.fill(),t.font="32px monospace",t.fillText(n[0],300,42),t.fillText(n[1],380,42),a!=="playing"){let d={paused:"PAUSED",won:"WON",lost:"LOST","left-won":"LEFT WINS","right-won":"RIGHT WINS"}[a]||a.toUpperCase();t.fillStyle="%23000c",t.fillRect(0,0,700,420),t.fillStyle=["won","left-won","right-won"].includes(a)?"%2339ff88":"%23ff5577",t.textAlign="center",t.fillText(d,350,210),t.textAlign="left"}},O=()=>{a!=="playing"&&a!=="paused"||(b(),a=a==="paused"?"playing":"paused")},h=d=>{x(d.key)&&(l.add(d.key.length===1?d.key.toLowerCase():d.key),d.preventDefault()),d.key===" "&&!d.repeat&&(O(),d.preventDefault()),d.key.toLowerCase()==="f"&&!d.repeat&&g(".gameFull",s).click()},v=d=>{x(d.key)&&(l.delete(d.key.length===1?d.key.toLowerCase():d.key),d.preventDefault())},f=d=>{let m=Math.min(.04,(d-(c||d))/1e3);c=d,G(m),M(),p=requestAnimationFrame(f)};return m=0;m<Math.ceil(d/16.67);m++)G(1/60);M()},U(),p=requestAnimationFrame(f),e.focus(),()=>{b(),cancelAnimationFrame(p),removeEventListener("keydown",h),removeEventListener("keyup",v),removeEventListener("blur",b)}}function pe(s){I(s,H("SETTINGS","Customize visuals and manage local data.",`<div class="grid"><div class="card"><h3>Matrix display</h3><label class="item"><input id="rainSetting" type="checkbox" class="card"><h3>Data</h3><p class="muted">Data is stored only for this website origin. Reset permanently deletes notes, tasks, history, settings, and scores.</p><button id="resetData" class="danger">RESET ALL LOCAL DATA</button></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Storage identity</h3><div class="output">${Z(location.origin==="null"?"opaque preview origin":location.origin)}<br>KEY: ${ht}</div></div></div>`)),g("%23rainSetting").onchange=e=>S.update("settings.rain",e.target.checked),g("%23densitySetting").oninput=e=>S.update("settings.density",Number(e.target.value)),g("%23accentSetting").oninput=e=>{S.update("settings.accent",e.target.value),q.style.setProperty("--green",e.target.value)},g("%23resetData").onclick=Mt}function Mt(){confirm("Delete all Bookmarklet of Destiny data saved on this site?")&&(S.reset(),X("Local data reset"),dt("home"))}function he(s){I(s,H("HELP & SHORTCUTS","Operational notes for the dashboard.",`<div class="grid"><div class="card"><h3>Global controls</h3><div class="list"><div class="item"><kbd>Ctrl/\u2318 K</kbd><span>Command palette</span></div><div class="item"><kbd>Esc</kbd><span>Close palette / exit fullscreen</span></div><div class="item"><kbd>F</kbd><span>Fullscreen active canvas game</span></div></div></div>%0A    <div class="card"><h3>Game controls</h3><div class="list"><div class="item"><kbd>WASD / Arrows</kbd><span>Snake, 2048, Pong</span></div><div class="item"><kbd>Space</kbd><span>Pause Snake or Pong</span></div><div class="item"><kbd>Right click</kbd><span>Flag Minesweeper cell</span></div></div></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Browser limitations</h3><p class="muted">Chrome blocks bookmarklets on protected pages including <code>chrome://</code>, the New Tab page, extension pages, and the Chrome Web Store. On ordinary sites, the dashboard opens in a separate resizable popup window.</p></div>%0A    <div class="card full"><h3>Privacy</h3><p class="muted">Only the optional USD/INR updater contacts the fixed Frankfurter exchange-rate endpoint. All other tools load no external assets and use no analytics or accounts. Notes, tasks, settings, history, rates, and scores stay in local storage belonging to the page where the bookmarklet launched.</p></div></div>`))}S.load();Qt();qt();F?.ready?.();})();%0A})(w,d,w.localStorage,w.location,w.navigator,w.crypto,w.TextEncoder,w.performance,w.devicePixelRatio,w.innerWidth,w.innerHeight,w.requestAnimationFrame.bind(w),w.cancelAnimationFrame.bind(w),w.addEventListener.bind(w),w.removeEventListener.bind(w),w.getComputedStyle.bind(w),w.confirm.bind(w),w.parent,w.ResizeObserver)}finally{delete window.__BOD_BOOTSTRAP__}w.focus()}catch(error){try{w.close()}catch(e){}delete window[key];console.error(error)}})()
